category_sources: source_facts.description says "Collection of C++ HTTP libraries"; official GitHub README calls Proxygen Facebook's C++ HTTP libraries and HTTPServer framework.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is proxygen; official repository is facebook/proxygen.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides install and overview documentation; README says internal API documentation is generated locally with Doxygen from the project root.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/facebook/proxygen, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README describes C++ HTTP abstractions, HTTP server framework, and support for HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, and HTTP/3.
